name: Squarespace
description: Monitor Squarespace website configuration, commerce products, and orders for operational compliance.

config.setupInstructions:
Requires: a Squarespace Commerce plan (Basic or Advanced) with Developer API Keys access.

1. Log in to your Squarespace site
2. In the left nav, click Settings, then scroll down and click Advanced
3. Click Developer API Keys
4. Click the GENERATE KEY button
5. Enter a key name (e.g. CompAI) and select permissions: Products (Read Only)
6. Record the generated key - it will only be shown once
7. Paste the API key below

Note: Each API key is specific to a single Squarespace website.

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Your Squarespace Commerce API key. Generate it in Settings > Advanced > Developer API Keys.

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verify Squarespace API access by retrieving basic site information via the Authorization API endpoint.

checks.name: Commerce Configuration
checks.description: List products from the Squarespace Commerce API to verify e-commerce configuration and product catalog access.
